overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during light rain. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers, wet reflective streets, pedestrians with umbrellas, and futuristic vehicles driving through wide intersections. The footage appears to be from a high-quality game engine (Cyberpunk 2077 style) with cinematic lighting and detailed urban architecture.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a rain-slicked covered walkway in a futuristic city at night. The camera moves forward past a woman in white clothing while a green military vehicle drives by on the left. Tall glass skyscrapers with yellow accents rise in the background, and digital billboards illuminate the scene as the camera approaches a wide intersection.

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into a vast open intersection surrounded by towering futuristic architecture. Pedestrians with colorful umbrellas cross the wet asphalt while futuristic vehicles drive through. An elevated highway ramp curves overhead, and a distinctive copper-tinted building dominates the right side of the frame.

A yellow futuristic taxi drives past on the left while pedestrians wait at the curb. The elevated highway ramp remains visible in the distance as the camera approaches the opposite sidewalk.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway lined with palm trees in planters and a glass curtain wall building on the left. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk in both directions, including a distinctive green-skinned woman with a blue umbrella. Yellow construction barriers and large digital billboards add to the cyberpunk aesthetic as the camera moves forward under the building overhang.

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the covered walkway, passing a prominent neon advertisement for Sweet Clean Speed on the right. The camera moves past various pedestrians including a person with a distinctive illuminated umbrella. Storefront windows and vending machines line the path as the walkway continues into the distance with palm trees receding into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban walkway into a vast, rain-slicked futuristic intersection and along its curving perimeter. It begins on a covered path, moving past a woman in white and a passing green military vehicle beneath the glow of digital billboards and yellow-accented skyscrapers. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene opens into a wide intersection where pedestrians with colorful umbrellas navigate wet asphalt under a curving elevated highway ramp and a towering copper-tinted building. The perspective then shifts right at the corner, gliding past a yellow futuristic taxi toward a modern white facade. Finally, the camera approaches the opposite sidewalk, keeping the distant highway ramp in view as it navigates the dense urban architecture.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk walkway that transitions from a bustling pedestrian corridor into a neon-drenched commercial stretch. It begins under a building overhang, gliding past palm trees in planters and a glass curtain wall while pedestrians with umbrellas, including a green-skinned woman, navigate around yellow construction barriers. As the camera pushes forward, the environment shifts toward a more commercial atmosphere, passing large digital billboards and glowing storefront windows. The scene then opens up to reveal a prominent neon advertisement for Sweet Clean Speed on the right, moving past a person with an illuminated umbrella and various vending machines. Finally, the camera continues its steady advance as the palm trees recede into the distance, deepening the immersion into the illuminated urban landscape.
